name: testDarkColorThemeSwitch
description: Verify that the user can switch to the dark theme
descriptionHtml: Verify that the user can switch to the dark theme

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that the user can switch to the dark theme

steps.name: Click the 'Dark' radio button in the user menu
Verify that the dark color theme is selected
